title: ONLY_FULL_GROUP_BY check fails due to negative value
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

create table t(a int);
explain select a,min(a) from t where a=-1;

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

No error

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
`ERROR 8123 (HY000): In aggregated query without GROUP BY, expression #1 of SELECT list contains nonaggregated column 'a'; this is incompatible with sql_mode=only_full_group_by`

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

v7.5.5
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER, b TEXT);
CREATE TABLE t2(c INTEGER, d REAL);
INSERT INTO t2(c, d) VALUES (NULL, 1.5), (2, NULL), (3, 3.5);
SELECT a, MIN(a) FROM t1 WHERE a = -1;
key_bug_features: ONLY_FULL_GROUP_BY check with negative value in query
